holdings.infoBox: EFFE is an equity ETF with a total of 110 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lenovo Group stock at 4.30%, Quanta Computer at 3.86%, Zhongji Innolight at 3.67%, Wistron at 3.66%, and Wiwynn at 3.52%.

overview.description: The Harbor Osmosis Emerging Markets Resource Efficient ETF (EFFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in companies within emerging markets that conduct business with positive environmental considerations. EFFE was launched on Dec 17, 2024 and is issued by Harbor.
